recommendations.title: Commitment
recommendations.overview: The son of a North Korean spy decides to follow in his father's footsteps to protect his little sister.

recommendations.title: The City of Violence
recommendations.overview: Tae-su, a detective fighting organized crime, returns to his hometown for his high school friend Wang-jae's funeral. There, he meets his old friends Pil-ho, Dong-hwan and Seok-hwan and they reminisce. Suspecting something fishy about Wang-jae's death

recommendations.title: The Thieves
recommendations.overview: A gang of South Korean thieves team up with a Hong Kong crew to steal a diamond necklace from a heavily-guarded casino safe in Macau. As the cops close in, old betrayals — and misunderstandings — resurface.

recommendations.title: Peninsula
recommendations.overview: A soldier and his team battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the wastelands of the Korean Peninsula.

recommendations.title: V.I.P.
recommendations.overview: A son to a high-ranked official in North Korea commits a series of murders going across the countries around the world. The movie depicts the following events as South Korea, North Korea and Interpol start chasing down after him.

recommendations.title: Secret Reunion
recommendations.overview: Two spies share a secret bond, despite their loyalties. A North Korean assassin is sent to Seoul to kill a dissident, but instead he teams up with a South Korean agent in search for revenge.

recommendations.title: Joint Security Area

recommendations.title: The Housemaid
recommendations.overview: Eun-yi is hired as a maid in a mansion owned by a wealthy businessman. He quickly starts seducing his employee who seemingly has little choice but to comply with his sexual advances. Soon the women of the family plot against Eun-yi who must fight an

recommendations.title: Deliver Us from Evil
recommendations.overview: A retired contract killer goes on a bloody rampage when a young girl finds herself at the mercy of gangland human traffickers and only one man can come to her rescue, with an arsenal of weapons and years of experience in the art of killing.

recommendations.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
